skills.name: using-devflow
skills.description: Bootstrap check: loaded before any action to ensure the agent uses the pipeline rather than cowboy-coding.

skills.name: classify-ticket
skills.description: Evaluates risk, reversibility, and precedent for a ticket.

skills.name: writing-a-spec
skills.description: Generates a delta spec (Given/When/Then), design docs, and a TDD checklist.

skills.name: using-worktrees
skills.description: Creates, names, and cleans up git worktrees for isolated development.

skills.name: tdd-loop
skills.description: Red-before-green TDD execution discipline with a hard retry cap.

skills.name: finishing-a-branch
skills.description: Committing, pushing, and opening a PR. Explicitly forbids self-merging.

skills.name: reviewing-a-pr
skills.description: How to perform a code review and how to resolve feedback.

skills.name: picking-a-jira-bug
skills.description: Guidelines for a human to select a bug from the Jira board.

commands.name: /devflow:propose
commands.description: Triggers ticket classification and sets up the spec folder.

commands.name: /devflow:apply
commands.description: Executes the TDD loop on a frozen spec.

commands.name: /devflow:archive
commands.description: Archives the spec after a successful merge.

commands.name: /devflow:explore
commands.description: Sandbox command for discussing ideas without committing to a proposal.
